why: New behavioral node sdd/collision-ladder (17 boolean scenarios) for the finer-than-node ladder (issue #189 second bullet): a read-only pairwise collision classifier that, at a known node-level collision, descends file -> region -> semantic(scenario) to downgrade a suspected false-hard to soft, plus the shared-thin-file hard->soft downgrade + smell flag. Reuses the touch-set-correction composition (gherkin-cli diff, resolve-governances) and adds a git diff -U0 region source; read-only w.r.t. the mission graph. Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS) on round 1; two non-blocking wording gaps fixed pre-freeze (file-rung scenario reworded to be observable-by-construction; a Use-Case row added for the no-anchor outcome). check-spec-state + check-suite green. Scope held strictly to the ladder + shared-thin downgrade; the star SSA-lowering / symbol-level capstone (issue #189 third bullet) deferred -- an overlapping-region code file stays hard, flagged symbol-rung-deferred. Medium blast (new node, single-writer by construction, no existing consumers yet), leash auto-all.

Cold sdd-impl-judge re-derived all 18 frozen collision-ladder scenarios as independent oracles. Round 1 rejected (IMPLEMENTATION_PASS false) — mutation testing caught one coverage gap: the TOON/JSON emission scenario tested the render helpers directly but never drove main()'s --format flag path (a mutation hard-coding the CLI format passed all tests); the engine flag logic was itself correct. Fixed test-only (frozen .feature untouched): the format scenario now drives main() end-to-end over a temp-file ClassifyInput capturing stdout; judge-iteration correction logged. Round 2 PASS: 18/18 scenarios independently confirmed, the named mutation now fails a test (17/1), 5 further mutation probes (null-hunks guard, overlap detection, code->soft, node-rollup inversion, shared-thin threshold off-by-one) all caught, structural read clean (genuine reuse of touch-set-correction collectChangedFiles/fileToNode not duplication, honest pure/IO split, no SSA/symbol bleed, .feature untouched since freeze b447b0ee). Root pnpm verify green (20/20). Medium blast internal SDD engine, single-writer, no consumers yet; leash auto-all.
